activities.title: Decompose Modern Document
activities.description: For .docx: two-phase. Fast phase invokes docxmcp extract_all synchronously; receives outline + template + manifest skeleton (background_status=running). Background phase runs in a detached child inside docxmcp container; opencode-side polling loop calls extract_all_collect every 5 s with wait=0 to ship incremental bundles until manifest flips to done or 180 s safety cap.

activities.title: Scan Legacy Office Bytes
activities.description: For .doc / .xls / .ppt: run the in-process layout-preserving printable-runs scanner (two-pass ASCII + UTF-16LE); produce body.md plus minimal manifest.

activities.title: Mark Format Unsupported
activities.description: For .xlsx / .pptx: write incoming/<stem>/unsupported.md explaining the constraint; produce manifest with status=unsupported.

activities.title: Record Decompose Failure
activities.description: On exception, timeout, or invalid output from any of A21..A23: write failure.md with one-line plain-language reason; produce manifest with status=failed.

arrows.label: docxmcp service over MCP transport + opencode-side polling loop
fast-phase 30 s hard timeout; polling 5 s interval; 180 s safety cap
